name: Pleasure Puzzle:Sexy Girls 趣拼拼：性感少女
short_description: Import pictures to create a custom jigsaw album that you will never finish playing. One key to import local images! Use F12 screenshots! Share your artistic taste with the world!
detailed_description:
Trilogy




About the Game

Game features:

You can import local pictures! Create your favorite jigsaw album!

Unlimited amount of big, ever lasting custom jigsaw album!

Use F12 screenshots to share your artistic taste with the world's players.

The picture can be JPG within 1920X1080.

Unlimited extension custom custom library to replace default background music!

You can customize the puzzle!

There is no language barrier.

Press the right mouse button to show digital prompts!
